metric_value: Consumers' time and dollars have become invested in technologies like high-speed broadband Internet
Companies like Microsoft and Sony are rolling out interactive gaming technologies that will not require a TV set

metric_name: ITV must be built into TV sets
metric_value: ITV capabilities will have to be included with future television sets, since many consumers will be unwilling to spend extra dollars on new hardware for existing sets
Right now, people are not going to alter their TVs to fit them for interactive TV functions
